subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! Hearken unto the call of this Wronged One, Who hath been afflicted with tribulations which none can reckon save the Reckoner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الارض ان استمعوا ندآء هذا المظلوم الذی بلی ببلایا مااحصیها الا المحصی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
